item.title: A field and a frolic 🌷 here’s to your new adventure!@corinn...
item.description:
View on Instagram


A field and a frolic 🌷 here’s to your new adventure!@corinnealexispdx ‘Big news, sweet friends!I’m off to chase my next adventure, which means Monday 4/21 will be my LAST day @ColombianCoffeeBeansPDXCatch me one more time at the stand from 12:30–7pm—come say hi, grab a drink, and send me off with some love (and caffeine).Would love to see all your faces before I go!’@simonbauershoots

item.title: Coffee & Cognition ☕️ Massimo Barbagallo, Anne Springer,...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Coffee & Cognition ☕️ Massimo Barbagallo, Anne Springer, Chiara Vanetta, Meret Allemann, Pratintip Lee, Soheil Saeedi, Stefanie Aeschbacher, Marco Luciani, Leo H. Bonati, Giorgio Moschovitis, Victor Scheu, Jonas Rutishauser, Richard Kobza, Marcello Di Valentino, Pascal B. Meyre, Nicolas Rodondi, David Conen, Michael Kühne, Stefan Osswald, Jürg H. Beer. Coffee Consumption Correlates With Better Cognitive Performance in Patients With a High Incidence for Stroke. Journal of the American Heart Association, 2024; DOI: 10.1161/JAHA.124.034365#Coffee #Caffeine

item.title: Why is betrayal so tempting, even when cooperation is better for...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Why is betrayal so tempting, even when cooperation is better for everyone? 🤔 Let’s talk about it.Jakub Svoboda, Krishnendu Chatterjee. Density amplifiers of cooperation for spatial games. Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences, 2024; 121 (50) DOI: 10.1073/pnas.2405605121#Cooperation #Psychology

item.title: It’s crazy cuz not only did I rid myself of the angry thing bu...
item.description:
View on Instagram


It’s crazy cuz not only did I rid myself of the angry thing but the person who made me upset miraculously reached out also lol 🤫 give it a try!!Yuta Kanaya, Nobuyuki Kawai. Anger is eliminated with the disposal of a paper written because of provocation. Scientific Reports, 2024; 14 (1) DOI: 10.1038/s41598-024-57916-z#Anger #Emotion

Good news everyone ✨ caffeine to the rescue 🫀it’s been quite the week I know u need it lol come see me at Colombian Coffee Beans on a Saturday Tuesday or Wednesday!! Xujia Lu et al. Habitual Coffee, Tea and Caffeine Consumption, Circulating Metabolites, and the Risk of Cardiometabolic Multimorbidity. JCEM, 2024 DOI: 10.1210/clinem/dgae552#Coffee #Caffeine

item.title: The power of touch on ur game 🏀 Take me courtside so I can te...

View on Instagram


The power of touch on ur game 🏀 Take me courtside so I can test this theory further plz 😈🔥😂Christiane M. Büttner, Christoph Kenntemich, Kipling D. Williams. The power of human touch: Physical contact improves performance in basketball free throws. Psychology of Sport and Exercise, 2024; 72: 102610 DOI: 10.1016/j.psychsport.2024.102610#Basketball #FreeThrow
